prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A white ensō (zen circle) — an incomplete circle drawn as a single organic brushstroke. The opening/gap of the ensō is in the upper right area of the circle. At the upper right where the gap is, a small solid red dot sits — like a subtle recording indicator. The red dot is small and quiet, placed near where the brushstroke ends or begins. The ensō brushstroke is organic, hand-painted, varies in thickness, confident. White stroke, tiny red dot upper right, black background. Nothing else. No text. No letters.
